reason: Response B has the denser, more ambitious figurative language ("the way salmon know the river," "the grim elegance of a figure skater who has given up on the gold," the cosmic ledger) and sustained, escalating prose paragraphs that reflect the kind of risk-taking literary register I tend toward. Response A is funny and well-constructed but leans on cleaner, more punchline-driven beats and a tidier structure that reads as the slightly more controlled mid-tier voice. The thematic cohesion and accumulating extended metaphors in B feel more characteristic of my output, though the two are close enough that this is not certain.
